title: Rich Italian Ricotta Salata Stir-fry
description: A rich and dense Italian dish featuring a unique blend of ricotta salata, which is whole30-friendly and adventurous with rapeseed oil.

ingredients.name: Avocado
ingredients.notes: Softens with heat and adds creaminess to the dish

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Sliced thinly for maximum flavor release

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for a zingy touch

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: To help with the texture and to enhance flavors

instructions: Heat rapeseed oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cumin seeds and sauté for about 30 seconds until they start to pop, being careful not to burn them.
Add garlic slices and cook for another minute until golden brown, stirring occasionally.
Drain avocado of excess water by squeezing it with your hands or a cheesecloth. Add drained avocado chunks into the skillet.
Pour in lemon juice while ensuring that most of the oil from the avocado is not released into the pan to avoid greasiness.
Add ricotta salata and continue stirring for about 2-3 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly but retains its creaminess.
Adjust seasoning with salt if needed. Serve hot as a snack or appetizer.
